title: French Attitudes on Climate Change, Carbon Taxation and other Climate Policies

tax_mentions.context: Approval of a proposed increase in the French carbon tax (+50€/tCO2) with the added revenue redistributed lump-sum to all adults.
tax_mentions.notes: Only 10% approve; 70% reject (+50€/tCO2 with lump-sum redistribution).

tax_mentions.context: Support for raising diesel taxation to catch up with gasoline levels.
Support for a Pigouvian tax on kerosene used for aviation.

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: Regulatory standards/prohibitions, not a carbon/fuel excise or tax instrument.
Cap-and-trade emissions trading scheme, not a carbon or fuel excise/tax.

inclusion_reason: Uses a representative French survey to analyze approval and determinants of a carbon-tax ‘Tax & Dividend’ and acceptability of fuel taxes (diesel, kerosene).
